xsl:when.test: ../../strikethrough_retail_price and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > 0 and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross and price/@gross = ../../price/@gross and ../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > $cena_serwis

(../../strikethrough_retail_price and (../../strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross)) or (price/@iaiext:promotional_gross and (price/@gross > price/@iaiext:promotional_gross)) or (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price and (../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > price/@gross or (price/@gross != ../../price/@gross and ../../promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > price/@gross)))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'biurko') or @code = '47855-uniw' or @code = '47856-uniw' or @code = '47857-uniw' or @code = '47858-uniw' or @code = '47859-uniw' or @code = '47860-uniw' or @code = '47861-uniw' or @code = '47862-uniw' or @code = '47863-uniw' or @code = '47864-uniw' or @code = '47865-uniw' or @code = '47866-uniw') and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'toaletka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'nadstawka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'fotel')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'fotele obrotowy')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'siłownik')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'komplet nóżek')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'kanapa')or @code = '59800-uniw' or @code = '59774-uniw' or @code = '59785-uniw' or @code = '59870-uniw' or @code = '59791-uniw' or @code = '59862-uniw' or @code = '59865-uniw' or @code = '59860-uniw' or @code = '59787-uniw' or @code = '59764-uniw' or @code = '59772-uniw' or @code = '59867-uniw' or @code = '59868-uniw' or @code = '59790-uniw' or @code = '59778-uniw' or @code = '59775-uniw' or @code = '59795-uniw' or @code = '59879-uniw' or @code = '53567-uniw' or @code = '59872-uniw' or @code = '59861-uniw' or @code = '59855-uniw' or @code = '59794-uniw' or @code = '60802-uniw' or @code = '60791-uniw' or @code = '59796-uniw' or @code = '59773-uniw' or @code = '59863-uniw' or @code = '59769-uniw' or @code = '59878-uniw' or @code = '59792-uniw' or @code = '59866-uniw' or @code = '57234-uniw' or @code = '59788-uniw' or @code = '59783-uniw' or @code = '59859-uniw' or @code = '59786-uniw' or @code = '59798-uniw' or @code = '59874-uniw' or @code = '59858-uniw' or @code = '59877-uniw' or @code = '59768-uniw' or @code = '59857-uniw' or @code = '59781-uniw' or @code = '59793-uniw' or @code = '59789-uniw' or @code = '59864-uniw' or @code = '59875-uniw' or @code = '59873-uniw' or @code = '59771-uniw' or @code = '59876-uniw' or @code = '59803-uniw' or @code = '59797-uniw' or @code = '58425-uniw' or @code = '59765-uniw' or @code = '59871-uniw' or @code = '59802-uniw' or @code = '59777-uniw' or @code = '59801-uniw' or @code = '59856-uniw' or @code = '59776-uniw' or @code = '59805-uniw' or @code = '59799-uniw' or @code = '59804-uniw' or @code = '59770-uniw' or @code = '59780-uniw' or @code = '59767-uniw' or @code = '59766-uniw' or @code = '59782-uniw' or @code = '59779-uniw' or @code = '59869-uniw' or @code = '57333-uniw' or @code = '59784-uniw' )

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'krzesł')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'toaletka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'pokrowiec')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'nadstawka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'lustro')) and not(contains(../../description/long_desc, 'Grupa: Lustro')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'materac')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'bez materac'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'poduszka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'sofa')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'narożnik')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'półk')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafa')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'witryna')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'regał')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'półka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'witryna')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'regału')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'dodatkowy')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'front')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'stelaż do łóżek')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'stolik') or contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'ława')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'ze stolikiem')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'do stolika')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'front')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafka nocna')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafka na buty')) and not(contains(../../description/name, 'RTV')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafka na buty')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(../../description/name, 'RTV')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'oświetlenie')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafa')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'nadstawka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafa półki')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'półkami')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'stolikiem')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szuflada łóżka') or contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szuflada kanapy')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'elementem całego zestawu'))

( contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'fotel')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'fotele obrotowy')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'siłownik')) and not(contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'komplet nóżek'))

( contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'regał')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'półka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'witryna')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'regału')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'zestaw')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'skrzynka'))

( contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'stolik') or contains(translate(../../description/name, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'ława')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'ze stolikiem')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'do stolika'))

( contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafka')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafka nocna')) and not(contains(translate(../../description, $upperLetters, $lowerLetters), 'szafka na buty')) and not(contains(../../description, 'RTV'))
